english: What is the role of the Chief Justice of India in the Indian judiciary?
hindi: भारतीय न्यायपालिका में मुख्य न्यायाधीश की भूमिका क्या है?
tamil: இந்திய நீதிமன்றத்தில் முதல் நீதிபதி குறித்துக் கூறுங்கள்
vietnamese: Mục đích của Chánh án Ấn Độ là gì trong hệ thống tư pháp Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: The Chief Justice of India is the highest-ranking judge of the Supreme Court of India and is responsible for the administration of justice in the country.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the Chief Justice has executive powers or refusing to answer due to lack of information about the Indian judiciary.
